name: Sunlit Sanctum
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Dawn.
flavor: Where the first light falls, hope takes root.
artPrompt: Golden marble sanctuary bathed in warm sunbeams through tall stained windows, drifting light motes, empty stone floor.

name: Highglade Chapel
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Dawn.
flavor: Bells ring at dawn for those who still believe.
artPrompt: Small white stone chapel atop a green highland hill under a soft sunrise, fluttering banners, distant mountains.

name: Aurora Steppe
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Dawn.
flavor: The sky itself kneels here.
artPrompt: Wide grassy steppe under a shimmering aurora-lit dawn sky, standing stone pillars catching golden light.

name: Moonlit Shoal
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Tide.
flavor: The tide remembers what the mind forgets.
artPrompt: Silver moonlit beach with glowing waves lapping over smooth dark stones, rolling mist.

name: Whispering Deep
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Tide.
flavor: Listen long enough, and the water answers.
artPrompt: Submerged cavern lit by bioluminescent currents, faint ghostly shapes drifting in blue-green light.

name: Tidecaller's Cove
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Tide.
flavor: Every wave obeys the one who asks first.
artPrompt: Rocky coastal cove with a swirling tidal whirlpool, spectral water wisps rising under a stormy sky.

name: Hollow Crypt
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Shade.
flavor: The dead keep better secrets than the living.
artPrompt: Cracked stone crypt with cobwebbed sarcophagi, faint violet witch-light glowing between shadows.

name: Nightveil Hollow
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Shade.
flavor: Darkness is only silence waiting to speak.
artPrompt: Twisted dead forest hollow shrouded in thick black mist, pale moon behind gnarled branches.

name: Ashen Catacomb
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Shade.
flavor: Ash remembers the shape of what burned.
artPrompt: Underground catacomb of ash-grey bones and dust, flickering purple candlelight on carved walls.

name: Cinder Forge
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Ember.
flavor: Where iron screams, fire answers.
artPrompt: Roaring blacksmith forge built into a volcanic crag, molten metal pouring, sparks flying into dark sky.

name: Emberfall Ridge
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Ember.
flavor: The mountain bleeds fire and does not apologize.
artPrompt: Jagged mountain ridge with rivers of lava cascading down cracked black rock under a smoke-red sky.

name: Molten Vent
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Ember.
flavor: Some doors should never be opened. This one always is.
artPrompt: Glowing volcanic vent spewing embers and smoke from a cracked earth fissure, heat haze in the air.

name: Wildroot Grove
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Thorn.
flavor: Roots remember every season they've survived.
artPrompt: Ancient grove with massive gnarled tree roots breaking through mossy earth, dappled green sunlight.

name: Verdant Hollow
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Thorn.
flavor: Life finds the cracks and grows anyway.
artPrompt: Lush hidden hollow overflowing with oversized ferns, wildflowers, and glowing fireflies at dusk.

name: Thornwood Bramble
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Thorn.
flavor: Beauty and blood, tangled together.
artPrompt: Dense thicket of thorned brambles and vines choking a stone ruin, small red berries glinting like eyes.

name: Temple Acolyte
text: Raid. When this Unit Strikes, restore 1 life to your face.
flavor: Faith is a small candle in a very large dark.
artPrompt: Temple acolyte from behind in full modest white-gold jubah, holding glowing prayer candle, no face visible.

name: Shieldwarden Recruit
text: Guard.
flavor: Stand between the blow and the innocent.
artPrompt: Armored recruit with closed full-face helmet and sunburst kite shield, face fully hidden by visor.

name: Radiant Cleric
text: When this Unit enters, restore 3 life to your face.
flavor: Her hands close wounds faster than words can open them.
artPrompt: Cleric from behind in loose white-gold jubah and deep hood covering head completely, channeling healing light, no face.

name: Sunblade Paladin
text: Ward. Guard. Whenever you restore life, deal 1 damage to a chosen enemy Unit.
flavor: Every strike he takes, someone else doesn't have to.
artPrompt: Dawn paladin in sealed golden greathelm covering entire face, glowing greatsword and shield.

name: Aurelian, the Dawnbreaker
text: Ward. Guard. Other Dawn Units you control have Guard. Whenever this Unit Strikes, restore 3 life to your face.
flavor: When the last light nearly fails, he becomes the sun.
artPrompt: Winged seraphic warrior from behind as silhouette against blinding golden light, face obscured.

name: Tidepool Scout
text: Raid. When this Unit enters, draw a card, then discard a card. Flash.
flavor: She reads the currents like a second language.
artPrompt: Tide scout from behind in deep hooded cloak at tidepool, no face visible.

name: Kelp Serpent Whelp
text: When this Unit enters, look at the top card of your deck. You may draw it; if you don't, put it on the bottom of your deck.
flavor: Small now. The ocean has time.
artPrompt: Small curious sea serpent hatchling coiled around a kelp strand, glowing faintly blue underwater.

name: Mistveil Adept
text: When this Unit enters, return target enemy Unit with cost 2 or less to its owner's hand.
flavor: She unmade his arrival before he finished his sentence.
artPrompt: Mistveil mystic from behind in full covering blue jubah and oversized hood, weaving water-mist, no face.

name: Abyssal Current Wraith
text: Ward. Whenever you draw a card, this Unit gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor: It does not swim. The ocean simply moves it.
artPrompt: Ghostly translucent water wraith with flowing spectral limbs, dragging a churning dark current behind it.

name: Nerissa, Tideborn Oracle
text: Ward. At the start of your turn, draw an additional card. Whenever you cast a Rite, gain 1 Essence of any faction this turn only.
flavor: She has already read tomorrow's tide charts.
artPrompt: Tideborn oracle rear-view silhouette in long modest jubah and veil above stormy waves, head covered, no face.

name: Ashwell Pilferer
text: Raid. Flash.
flavor: What's spent in the Ashwell isn't always done being useful.
artPrompt: Hooded thief over a grave, deep hood casting total darkness over face, only gloved hand on trinket.

name: Crypt Stalker
text: When this Unit enters, target opponent discards a card.
flavor: It knew your name before you did.
artPrompt: Shadow-cloaked silhouette between crypt pillars, face fully obscured, only twin light points, no facial detail.

name: Soulrend Assassin
text: Drain. When this Unit enters, deal 1 damage to target enemy Unit.
flavor: One breath in. Zero breaths out.
artPrompt: Assassin in full face-covering dark mask and hood with twin daggers, no facial features.

name: Dreadmaw Revenant
text: Drain. Whenever this Unit deals combat damage to a Unit, target opponent discards a card.
flavor: It remembers dying. It's still bitter about it.
artPrompt: Shrouded undead revenant silhouette, head covered by torn grave-cloth, shadow maw, no human face detail.

name: Malvora, Queen of Ash
text: Drain. Ward. Whenever an enemy Unit dies, gain 1 Essence of Shade this turn only and draw a card.
flavor: She did not conquer the throne. She outlasted it.
artPrompt: Undead queen from behind, cracked crown on hooded head, long ash-grey jubah, black flame, no face.

name: Ember Whelp
text: Raid. Flash.
flavor: It hasn't learned patience. It doesn't plan to.
artPrompt: Small fierce fire-drake whelp with tiny flickering flames along its spine, snarling eagerly.

name: Cinderclaw Skirmisher
text: Raid.
flavor: Fast enough to hit twice before you flinch once.
artPrompt: Fire skirmisher from behind with sealed opaque helmet and burning claw gauntlets, no face.

name: Ashfang Berserker
text: Raid. Whenever this Unit Strikes a Unit, deal 1 damage to that Unit's controller's face.
flavor: Pain is just fuel he hasn't burned yet.
artPrompt: Berserker in horned closed helmet fully hiding the face, twin flaming axes.

name: Cinderlord Ravager
text: Raid. Pierce. When this Unit enters, deal 2 damage to target enemy Unit.
flavor: He doesn't break the line. He erases it.
artPrompt: Fire-warlord in full plate with sealed face-covering helm smashing burning warhammer.

name: Ignis, the Wildfire King
text: Raid. Pierce. Whenever you cast a Rite, this Unit gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
flavor: Every ember remembers his name.
artPrompt: Wildfire king from behind as crowned silhouette with cloak of living flame, face hidden.

name: Sprigwood Tender
text: When this Unit enters, you may play an additional Domain this turn.
flavor: She talks to seeds. They usually answer.
artPrompt: Forest spirit from behind in leafy modest hooded robe covering head and body, holding glowing seed, no face.

name: Bramblehide Boar
flavor: It doesn't dodge. It's never had to.
artPrompt: Massive tusked boar with thick bark-like hide and a thorny back ridge, charging through underbrush.

name: Grovewarden Treant
text: Guard. When this Unit enters, search your deck for a basic Domain card and put it into your hand.
flavor: The forest sent its oldest to answer the call.
artPrompt: Ancient tree-being with bark-armored limbs and glowing moss eyes, standing protectively before a grove.

name: Ancient Titanbark
text: This Unit costs 1 less Essence for each Domain you control beyond your first (maximum 2 less).
flavor: Every ring in its trunk is a century it refused to fall.
artPrompt: Colossal ancient tree-titan with stone-like bark and massive root limbs crushing the earth beneath it.

name: Yggrid, the World Root
text: Guard. At the start of your turn, you may play an additional Domain. Whenever you play a Domain, this Unit gets +1/+1 permanently.
flavor: All roots lead back to her.
artPrompt: Immense world-tree spirit with glowing golden roots spreading across a lush valley, radiant canopy above.

name: Blessing of Dawn
text: Restore 4 life to your face. If you're above 15 life, draw a card.
flavor: Hope, cast like a spell because sometimes it is one.
artPrompt: Beam of soft golden light descending from parting clouds onto an open upturned hand.

name: Aegis Ward
text: Target Unit you control gains Ward and Guard until your next turn.
flavor: Nothing gets through. Not this time.
artPrompt: Glowing golden shield-rune barrier flaring to life in front of an unseen figure, sparks deflecting off it.

name: Tidal Recall
text: Return target Unit to its owner's hand.
flavor: The sea always takes things back eventually.
artPrompt: A translucent wave curling backward, pulling a shadowy silhouette of a warrior into swirling water.

name: Deep Insight
text: Draw 2 cards. If this is the second spell you've cast this turn, draw an additional card.
flavor: The answer was always in the current.
artPrompt: Glowing water-glyphs spiraling upward from a still pool into the shape of an open eye.

name: Riptide Surge
text: Return all Units with cost 3 or less to their owners' hands.
flavor: The tide does not negotiate.
artPrompt: Massive surging wave sweeping across a battlefield, dragging armored silhouettes back into the churning sea.

name: Shadow Bite
text: Deal 2 damage to target Unit. Drain.
flavor: It doesn't need teeth. The dark bites just fine.
artPrompt: Jagged shadow-tendril lashing out from darkness like a blade, faint red glow at its tip.

name: Soul Siphon
text: Target opponent discards a card, then you gain 1 life for each card in their hand.
flavor: She took his secrets. He didn't notice they were gone.
artPrompt: Gloved hand drawing violet soul-energy into an abstract glowing rune orb from a kneeling fully hooded silhouette; no face anywhere.

name: Harvest of Shadows
text: Deal 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of target enemy Units. Drain.
flavor: Reap what the dark has been growing.
artPrompt: Multiple thin shadow-scythes bursting simultaneously from cracked ground toward several distant figures.

name: Spark Bolt
text: Deal 3 damage to target Unit. Pierce.
flavor: Small fire. Big opinion.
artPrompt: A single crackling bolt of orange fire streaking through the air, trailing sparks.

name: Wildfire Rush
text: Deal 1 damage to all enemy Units.
flavor: It doesn't ask which ones. It just spreads.
artPrompt: Wide low sheet of fire rushing outward across scorched grass, small flames leaping up on either side.

name: Inferno's Wrath
text: Deal 5 damage to target Unit. Pierce.
flavor: Some fires are just very focused opinions.
artPrompt: Massive column of roaring fire erupting from the ground, engulfing a lone armored silhouette.

name: Overgrowth
text: Play an additional Domain this turn. Target Unit you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
flavor: Give it a season. Give it a foothold. That's enough.
artPrompt: Thick vines and roots suddenly bursting up through cracked stone, blooming rapidly with green light.

name: Sanctuary of Light
text: At the start of your turn, restore 1 life to your face. If you're at 20 life, draw a card instead.
flavor: As long as this stands, no one falls alone.
artPrompt: Camp under golden protective dome; all figures from behind or helmeted silhouettes in modest cloaks/jubah; no faces, no beards.

name: Everflow Current
text: spells you cast cost 1 less Essence (any type), to a minimum of 1.
flavor: The water never stops moving, and neither should you.
artPrompt: Endless glowing spiral of flowing water encircling a floating rune, self-sustaining current.

name: Pact of the Hollow
text: Whenever a Unit you control dies, target opponent discards a card and you gain 1 life.
flavor: Every death here is a transaction, not a tragedy.
artPrompt: Skeletal hand emerging from cracked earth holding a glowing dark contract-rune, black smoke curling upward.

name: Everburning Brand
text: Whenever you play a Unit, it gains Raid until end of turn.
flavor: Once lit, it forgets how to stop.
artPrompt: Branding iron shaped like a flame sigil glowing white-hot, embers scattering in the dark.

name: Rootbound Pact
text: Whenever you play a Domain, target Unit you control gets +1/+1 permanently.
flavor: Plant something here, and it will outlive you.
artPrompt: Glowing green rune carved into a living tree trunk, roots pulsing faintly with light beneath the soil.

name: Runeforged Blade
text: Whenever a Unit you control Strikes a Unit, deal 1 additional damage to it.
flavor: It doesn't need a wielder to be dangerous.
artPrompt: Ornate ancient sword embedded upright in stone, glowing runes pulsing faintly along its blade.

name: Vault of Ages
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of any faction. Activate only once per turn.
flavor: Every faction has paid into this, whether they meant to or not.
artPrompt: Massive ornate stone vault door covered in five glowing elemental sigils, faint light leaking from the seams.

name: Shattered Hourglass
text: At the start of your turn, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
flavor: Time broke here. It still shows you glimpses.
artPrompt: Cracked hourglass frozen mid-fall, sand hanging suspended in the air, faint glowing fractures spreading across the glass.

name: Sunwell Sanctum
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Dawn.
flavor: Vault Runners kneel here before the Oathbound Descent.
artPrompt: Sunwell Sanctum, atmospheric Dawn sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Chapel of the Oathbound
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Dawn.
flavor: Every Runner swears before its broken altar.
artPrompt: Chapel of the Oathbound, atmospheric Dawn sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Tidewatch Cistern
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Tide.

artPrompt: Tidewatch Cistern, atmospheric Tide sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Drowned Archive Pool
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Tide.

artPrompt: Drowned Archive Pool, atmospheric Tide sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Ashwell Threshold
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Shade.

artPrompt: Ashwell Threshold, atmospheric Shade sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Catalog of Whispers
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Shade.
flavor: Every slip filed here is a secret kept sealed.
artPrompt: Catalog of Whispers, atmospheric Shade sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Emberforge Hearth
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Ember.

artPrompt: Emberforge Hearth, atmospheric Ember sanctum landscape, runes, no human faces.

name: Cinder Ledger Hall
text: Exhaust: Gain 1 Essence of Ember.

name: Thornroot Terrace
